data.title: Restructure INSTALL.md into Required and Optional-by-stack sections
data.description:
## Testing Mode
GREEN

## Description
Restructure plugins/dso/docs/INSTALL.md into two main sections:
- ## Required: Universal tools and setup steps for all stacks
- ## Optional by Stack: Per-stack subsections (Python, Node/JS, Ruby, Rust) with stack-specific setup

TDD exemption: Criterion 3 — static documentation asset.

Note: This story is deferrable if Epics A+B are not yet merged (per epic SC5).

## Files to Modify
- plugins/dso/docs/INSTALL.md (EDIT)

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] INSTALL.md contains ## Required section
  Verify: grep -q '## Required' $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/plugins/dso/docs/INSTALL.md
- [ ] INSTALL.md contains ## Optional section with per-stack subsections
  Verify: grep -q 'Optional.*Stack\|Optional.*stack' $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/plugins/dso/docs/INSTALL.md
